goals.title: Fix Intent Routing Failure
goals.description: Fix the intent routing failure in openexec chat where all inputs fail with 'model could not determine intent with high confidence'
goals.success_criteria: User inputs are successfully routed to appropriate handlers without the low confidence error
goals.verification_method: Run 'openexec chat' and send test queries; verify they receive valid responses from general_chat tool

stories.title: CLI Chat End-to-End Integration Test
stories.description: As a developer, I want automated E2E tests for the chat command so that routing regressions are caught early
acceptance_criteria: E2E test starts server, sends queries, validates responses
Test covers: help query, unknown query, surgical tool query
Test verifies no 'could not determine intent' errors appear

stories.title: Goal Validation: Intent Routing Fix Verification
stories.description: As a project stakeholder, I want E2E validation that the intent routing fix works so that I can confirm the goal is achieved
acceptance_criteria: Manual or automated test of 'openexec chat' with various inputs
All test queries receive valid responses from general_chat or appropriate tool
No 'model could not determine intent with high confidence' errors observed
stories.verification_script: go build ./cmd/openexec && echo 'help' | timeout 5 ./openexec chat --port 18765 2>&1 | grep -v 'could not determine'

stories.title: Discovery: Analyze Intent Routing Flow
stories.description: As a developer, I want to understand the current intent routing flow so that I can identify the root cause of the low confidence error
acceptance_criteria: Document the complete flow from CLI chat input to tool execution
Identify where 'could not determine intent with high confidence' message originates
Map all fallback paths in BitNetRouter and Coordinator
Verify skipAvailabilityCheck flag behavior in production vs test

stories.title: Harden BitNetRouter Fallback Logic
stories.description: As a CLI user, I want the router to always return a usable intent so that my queries never fail with cryptic error messages
acceptance_criteria: ParseIntent never returns an error - always falls back to general_chat
simulateInference returns valid JSON for any input when skipAvailabilityCheck=true
Confidence threshold of 0.2 is consistently applied
All fallback paths return confidence >= 0.5 to avoid coordinator re-fallback
stories.verification_script: go test ./internal/router/... -v -cover -coverprofile=coverage.out && go tool cover -func=coverage.out | grep -E 'ParseIntent|simulateInference'

stories.title: Harden Coordinator ProcessQuery Error Handling
stories.description: As a CLI user, I want the coordinator to always produce a response so that I never see internal errors
acceptance_criteria: ProcessQuery never returns error when general_chat tool is registered
Low confidence handling logs appropriately but does not fail
